sine_ms_bridge_core
module sine_ms_bridge_core #(
parameter 
DEFAULT_AMPLITUDE
 = 
0.5,
parameter 
DEFAULT_POINTS_PER_PERIOD
 = 
48
)
(
input 
real 
vdd,
input 
real 
vss,
output 
real 
voutp,
output 
real 
voutn,
input 
real 
vinp,
input 
real 
vinn,
output 
logic 
clk_observed,
input 
logic 
clk_driven,
input 
bit 
clk_enabled
)

Converts differential signals to single-ended.

Driver
amplitude_driven
real amplitude_driven = DEFAULT_AMPLITUDE

The amplitude that will be driven onto the net.

points_per_period
int points_per_period = DEFAULT_POINTS_PER_PERIOD

The number of points driven per period of the oscillation; effectively sets the precision of the driver. More points -> smaller timestep and more precision.

phase
real phase

The current phase that is being driven

frequency
real frequency

The current frequency that is being driven

Monitor

These are signals that are intended to be used by the proxy to signal values to the monitor.

amplitude_observed
real amplitude_observed

The amplitude that is observed at the input; that is, the amplitude that is believed to be the current received one.

differential
real differential

Signal used by the monitor to know when an update to the amplitude is available. Cleared automatically when the differential changes, i.e. when the monitor should be done sampling.
